steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice most effectively emphasizes when and where Argentum debuted. The two key details are the year (2018) and the location (New York City, New York). The correct choice must make both details prominent, not buried or omitted.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'As is common of Grimanesa Amoros’s sculptures, the iridescent multicolored LED domes of Argentum cut an imposing 253-cubic foot figure when the plece debuted.': Mentions the debut but gives no year and no location. The focus is on the sculpture's materials and size. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Artist Grimanesa Amoros often works with light in her sculptures which tend to be large in scale.': A general description of Amoros's style. No debut date, no location, no mention of Argentum debuting at all. ✗
  • Choice C — 'In 2018, Grimanesa Amoros debuted Argentum in New York City, New York.': Opens with the year (2018) and ends with the location (New York City, New York) — both details are front-and-center. ✓
  • Choice D — 'Grimanesa Amoros is a Peruvian American artist who often works with LED light in her large-scale sculptures, such as Argentum 2018.': The year appears only as a label tacked onto the title; there is no location. Neither detail is meaningfully emphasized. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
